summary: Subscription system testing completed. All 14 features tested - Backend APIs (plans, status, checkout, cancel, feature access, webhook) and Frontend billing page all working correctly. Stripe integration is REAL (not mocked) using test key.
critical_code_review_comments: Stripe integration uses emergentintegrations library with test key (sk_test_emergent)
All 3 plans correctly configured: Essentiel (19€), Pro (29€), Business (59€)
Feature gating properly implemented: Essentiel has 30 invoice limit, Pro/Business unlimited
Kits access correctly restricted: Essentiel=false, Pro/Business=true
Checkout creates real Stripe session and redirects to Stripe hosted payment page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription system fully implemented and tested. Stripe checkout redirects to real Stripe payment page (sandbox mode). Admin user has plan='trial_pending' and is_active=false. Feature gating works based on plan type.

GET /api/subscription/plans returns all.details: Returns essentiel (19€), pro (29€), business (59€) with all features

GET /api/subscription/status returns use.details: Returns plan, plan_name, status, is_active, is_trial, features, invoices_this_month, invoices_limit

POST /api/subscription/checkout creates.details: Creates real Stripe checkout session, returns checkout_url and session_id

POST /api/subscription/cancel cancels su.details: Returns 400 for trial users (no subscription to cancel), 200 for paid users

Billing page shows current subscription.details: Shows 'Votre abonnement actuel' card with plan, status, invoices count

Billing page displays all 3 plans with f.details: Shows Essentiel, Pro, Business cards with prices and feature lists

Pro plan is marked as 'Le plus populaire.details: Orange badge 'Le plus populaire' displayed on Pro plan card

Feature gating: Essentiel plan has 30 in.details: Essentiel shows '30 Factures par mois: 30' in features

Feature gating: Pro/Business have unlimi.details: Pro and Business show 'Illimité Factures par mois: Illimité'

Feature gating: Only Pro/Business have a.details: Essentiel shows X for 'Kits prédéfinis', Pro/Business show checkmark

Trial system still works (14 days).details: Subscription status includes is_trial, trial_end_date, trial_days_remaining fields

Webhook endpoint /api/webhook/stripe exi.details: Endpoint accepts POST requests and returns status response

mocked_apis.note: Stripe checkout session creation is REAL but uses test key (sk_test_emergent). Redirects to actual Stripe hosted payment page in sandbox mode.

stripe_integration_details.checkout_flow: Creates real Stripe checkout session -> Redirects to checkout.stripe.com -> Webhook handles payment events

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. All subscription features working correctly.
